tasks.label: 🖥 Servers
tasks.command: lsof -ti:8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:8082 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd '${workspaceFolder}/..' && ${MLX_HONCHO:-/opt/homebrew/anaconda3/envs/mlx/bin/honcho} start

tasks.label: 🤖 Agent V2
tasks.command: echo '⏳ รอ server...' && until curl -s http://localhost:8080/v1/models > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done && echo '✅ ready' && cd '${workspaceFolder}' && ${MLX_PYTHON:-/opt/homebrew/anaconda3/envs/mlx/bin/python} endeavor_agent.py
